3279270.name: REGOLITH: VIOZIC SUNS
3279270.description:
REGOLITH: VIOZIC SUNS is a top-down, roguelite space shooter game for PC set within a handcrafted and procedurally-generated galaxy.

Take the role of an illegally-immortal mercenary pilot looking to secure their name in fame and notoriety with the help of a motley crew of contractors that may or may not have your best interests in mind.

Alter your ship's equipment and internals to your liking and playstyle - or towards the needs of your missions.

Explore the world and push the limits of where you're allowed to be...

REGOLITH is still in its early development stages, and has a long way to go. Please be patient, I'm just one guy!
